initial_program:
% A cell is any position that occurs in the input (including zero)
cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,_).

% A nonzero cell in a row (a source)
source(R,Col,V) :- input(R,Col,V), V != 0.

% Does the row contain a source
row_has_source(R) :- source(R,Col,V).

% Allowed colour for each cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,Col,V), C < Col,        Color = 0.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,Col,V), C = Col,        Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,Col,V), C > Col, (C - Col) = 2*F,  Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,Col,V), C > Col, (C - Col) = 2*F + 1, Color = 5.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- not row_has_source(R),           Color = 0.

% Exactly one colour for every cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- cell(R,C).

% Disallow colours that are not allowed
:- not allowed(R,C,Color), output(R,C,Color).

rounds.program_after:
% A cell is any position that occurs in the input (including zero)
cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,_).

% A nonzero cell in a row (a source)
source(R,Col,V) :- input(R,Col,V), V != 0.

% Does the row contain a source
row_has_source(R) :- source(R,Col,V).

% Allowed colour for each cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- not row_has_source(R), Color = 0.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = 5.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- not row_has_source(R), Color = 0.

% Exactly one colour for every cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- cell(R,C).

% Disallow colours that are not allowed
:- not allowed(R,C,Color), output(R,C,Color).

rounds.program_after:
% A cell is any position that occurs in the input (including zero)
cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,_).

% A nonzero cell in a row (a source)
source(R,Col,V) :- input(R,Col,V), V != 0.

% Does the row contain a source
row_has_source(R) :- source(R,Col,V).

% Allowed colour for each cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- not row_has_source(R), Color = 0.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = 5.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- not row_has_source(R), Color = 0.

% Exactly one colour for every cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- cell(R,C).

% Disallow colours that are not allowed
:- not allowed(R,C,Color), output(R,C,Color).

final_program:
% A cell is any position that occurs in the input (including zero)
cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,_).

% A nonzero cell in a row (a source)
source(R,Col,V) :- input(R,Col,V), V != 0.

% Does the row contain a source
row_has_source(R) :- source(R,Col,V).

% Allowed colour for each cell
allowed(R,C,Color) :- not row_has_source(R), Color = 0.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = V.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- source(R,C,V), Color = 5.
allowed(R,C,Color) :- not row_has_source(R), Color = 0.

% Exactly one colour for every cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- cell(R,C).

% Disallow colours that are not allowed
:- not allowed(R,C,Color), output(R,C,Color).
